Package cityrescue

Class Station

java.lang.Object
cityrescue.Station
public class Station extends Object
Station.java symbolises a rescue station within the city. Each station has a unique ID, a name, a location as a coordinate and a capacity to determine how many units can be stores within the stations. This class manages the unit capacity and may remove or add units accordingly.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Station(int id, String name, int x, int y)
    Constructs a station used to store units.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Constructor Details

    • Station

      public Station(int id, String name, int x, int y)
      Constructs a station used to store units. Sets the default capacity to 10 and begins with no units.
      Parameters:
      id - this is the unique identifier for the station
      name - this is the name of the station
      x - this is the x coordinate for the location of the station
      y - this is the y coordinate for the location of the station

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the identifier for the station
      Returns:
      station ID

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of the station
      Returns:
      name of the station as a string

    • getX

      public int getX()
      Returns the x coordinate of the station's location
      Returns:
      x coordinate of the station's location

    • getY

      public int getY()
      Returns the y coordinate of the station's location
      Returns:
      y coordinate of the station's location

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()
      Returns the capacity of the station.
      Returns:
      capacity of the station

    • getUnitCount

      public int getUnitCount()
      Returns current number of units assigned to that station.
      Returns:
      number of units present in the station

    • setCapacity

      public void setCapacity(int capacity)
      Sets a capacity to the station to determine how many units can be stored in that station.
      Parameters:
      capacity - the new capacity of that station

    • addUnit

      public void addUnit()
      Adds a single unit to the station, increments unit count by 1. Occurs when a unit is assigned to that particular station.

    • removeUnit

      public void removeUnit()
      Removes a single unit from the station, decreasing the unit count by 1. Occurs when a unit is moved away from the station to a potential incident.
